examples: I had my first job at a local diner called the Buttercup Bakery when I was 22.
But my first real long-term job was at a local diner called the Buttercup Bakery.
I continued working at the Buttercup, making plans for the restaurant I would open.
Done up with buttercup walls and dramatically dark colonial furnishings, they feel anything but clinical.
Slide it all onto a plate and crown the lot with a fried egg, as bright and cheerful as a buttercup.
